name: STING Corporate View Style Packs
description: Single-source-of-truth visual presentation packs. Every pack except the root extends corp-base; only fields that override the parent need to be set. Drawing-type recipes reference packs by id (extendsChain resolved at runtime).

stylePacks.name: Corporate Base (root of extends chain)
stylePacks.description: All other packs extend this. Only set fields here that are invariant across every corporate output — house line weights, text/dim styles, hatch palette, and the universal filter rules.

stylePacks.name: Corporate Plan
stylePacks.description: 1:100 architectural plan. Walls bold, floors halftoned, ceilings hidden, grids un-halftoned.

stylePacks.name: Corporate RCP
stylePacks.description: Reflected ceiling plan, extends Corporate Plan. Walls halftoned, ceilings shown, lights un-halftoned.

stylePacks.name: Corporate Section
stylePacks.description: 1:50 building section. Cut elements bold, beyond elements halftoned.

stylePacks.name: Corporate Elevation
stylePacks.description: 1:100 elevation. Outline bold, internal lines fine, topo halftoned.

stylePacks.name: Corporate Detail
stylePacks.description: 1:20 / 1:10 detail. Maximum line variety, hatching shown, dimensions dense.

stylePacks.name: Clarification Sketch
stylePacks.description: RFI / clarification mark-up. Red callouts, design-intent overlay.

stylePacks.name: MEP Coordination
stylePacks.description: Multi-discipline clash plan. Mechanical blue / Plumbing green / Electrical amber / Fire red / Structural purple.

stylePacks.name: Fabrication Shop Drawing
stylePacks.description: Workshop-floor look. Bold MEP, walls/structural hidden, ordinate dimensions.

stylePacks.name: Technical Presentation
stylePacks.description: Internal IDR / TDR. Rich colours, bold outlines, suppressed annotations.

stylePacks.name: Client Presentation
stylePacks.description: Greyscale client presentation derived from Technical Presentation.

stylePacks.name: Demolition Phase
stylePacks.description: Demolition drawings. Existing-to-remain halftoned, demolished elements bold red dashed, new construction hidden.

stylePacks.name: Healthcare Clinical
stylePacks.description: Generic clinical plan / RCP / equipment. Beds, scrub stations, pendants, medical FF&E and BS 8300 access shown in healthcare blue with NHS room data palette.

stylePacks.name: Healthcare Medical Gas
stylePacks.description: HTM 02-01 medical gas pipeline distribution. O2 white, N2O blue, AIR-4 black/white, AIR-7 black/white, VAC yellow, AGSS purple/yellow. Manifolds, area valve service units, terminal units highlighted.

stylePacks.name: Healthcare Pressure Regime
stylePacks.description: HTM 03-01 / SHTM 03-01 ventilation pressure cascades. Positive zones blue, negative red, neutral grey, with door arrows showing flow direction.

stylePacks.name: Healthcare Essential Electrical Services
stylePacks.description: HTM 06-01 / NFPA 99 / NFPA 110 essential electrical services. Type A (life safety, <0.5s) red, Type B (critical, <15s) orange, Type C (equipment, <40s) yellow, normal supply grey.

stylePacks.name: Healthcare Fire Strategy
stylePacks.description: HTM 05-02 / BS 9999 fire compartmentation. 30/60/90/120-min fire-rated walls colour-coded; smoke barriers green dashed; sub-compartments solid red.

stylePacks.name: Healthcare Radiation Shielding
stylePacks.description: NCRP 147 / IPEM 75 / IAEA SRS 47 radiation shielding. Lead-equivalent walls bold magenta, controlled/supervised zones colour-banded, dose monitoring positions marked.

stylePacks.name: Healthcare Anti-Ligature
stylePacks.description: Mental health / dementia / paediatric anti-ligature audit drawings. Ligature-resistant fittings highlighted purple, anti-bind doors magenta, observation lines from staff base shown.

stylePacks.name: Healthcare Water Safety
stylePacks.description: HTM 04-01 water safety / Legionella control. DCW blue, DHW red, DHWR yellow, dead-leg risk magenta, TMV mixed-water green, temp-monitor sensors highlighted.

filterRules.name: STING - Plumb: Domestic Hot Water Supply (DHWS)

stylePacks.name: Presentation — Burgundy / Green
stylePacks.description: Client-facing presentation pack. Burgundy walls + dark-green topo on cream paper. Hand-rendered hatch palette.

stylePacks.name: Presentation — Interior Sage
stylePacks.description: Interior elevation presentation. Sage walls, warm wood casework, soft ambient palette. Suppressed grids/dimensions.

stylePacks.name: Project Architectural Presentation
stylePacks.description: Project-level pack — managed; pastel tags; lighter line weights for client presentation.

stylePacks.name: Project MEP Coordination
stylePacks.description: Project-level pack — managed; thin lines for clash review.

stylePacks.name: Project Structural
stylePacks.description: Project-level pack — external (uses project's existing structural template).

stylePacks.name: Presentation Base (parent of all pres-* packs)
stylePacks.description: Parent for every presentation pack. Turns off MEP, structural framing/foundations/connections, rebar, conduits/cable trays, fire/comms/security devices, scope boxes/grids/levels/reference planes — every category that does not contribute to a presentation drawing. Themed pres-* children extend this and only add colour overrides on the categories that actually paint the building.

stylePacks.name: Presentation — Pink / Teal
stylePacks.description: Architecture A (Hidden Line). Soft pink building line work against a flat teal #5BA8A0 background. Walls render in pink #E890BC over white surfaces with a horizontal-cladding pattern (STING-Pres-HorizontalCladding @ #F0B8D4); roofs use STING-Pres-RoofHatch @ #F090C0; floors solid pink #F090C0. Topography in a teal herringbone (STING-Pres-Herringbone @ #B8DED8) on white. Ground base sub-element (Generic Models:STING-PresGround) is white-filled with a teal #2A8A80 outline weight 5. Furniture/Casework/Specialty Equipment halftoned pink. Set view background to flat teal in Graphic Display Options.

stylePacks.name: Presentation — Blue Line
stylePacks.description: Architecture A (Hidden Line). All building line work in blue #1B6EA8. Light grey #F0F0F0 background. Floors washed pale blue #C8DCF0; walls white with light-blue cladding lines (STING-Pres-HorizontalCladding @ #90B8D8); ground base sub-element solid blue #1B6EA8 with weight 4 outline. Site herringbone in #90B8D8 on white. Large trees ghost white #FFFFFF with blue outline; small shrubs blue outline only (no fill).

stylePacks.name: Presentation — Red / Mint
stylePacks.description: Architecture A (Hidden Line). Building line work in red #B81818 against a mint #8FCEC0 background. Floors washed salmon #F0A0A0; walls white with red cladding lines (STING-Pres-HorizontalCladding @ #E89090). Site herringbone in #EEB0B0 on white; ground base sub-element solid red #B81818 with weight 4 outline. Large trees solid white #FFFFFF with teal outline #6ABCB0; small shrubs teal outline only — designed to recede into the mint backdrop. Set view background to flat mint in Graphic Display Options.

stylePacks.name: Presentation — Salmon
stylePacks.description: Architecture A (Hidden Line). Salmon/peach #E8B8A8 background. All building line work in terracotta salmon #C06040 over light-salmon #E8A898 floor washes; walls white with horizontal-cladding pattern (STING-Pres-HorizontalCladding @ #E8C0B0). Ground base sub-element solid dark terracotta #A03818 with weight 4 outline. Site herringbone in #E0B8A8 on white. Large trees white solid with salmon outline; small shrubs light-salmon outline only.

stylePacks.name: Presentation — Rosewood / Sage
stylePacks.description: Architecture A (Hidden Line). Dual-colour semantic palette on a cream #EDE8DF background. Burgundy #7B3535 = ground-plane and structural cuts; sage green #8BAF85 = floors, roofs, and active surfaces. Walls render with horizontal cladding (STING-Pres-HorizontalCladding @ #C4A0A0); roofs use STING-Pres-RoofHatch @ #8BAF85 over white; topography uses STING-Pres-Herringbone @ #D8C0B8 on cream. Ground base sub-element solid burgundy with #5A2020 outline weight 4. Large trees solid white with burgundy outline; small shrubs burgundy outline only.

stylePacks.name: Presentation — Yellow Fill
stylePacks.description: Architecture B (Consistent Colors). Entire building overridden to solid yellow #F0C020 — semantic distinction (floor vs wall vs roof) emerges from face direction and sun-study shading rather than from line work. Set visual style to Consistent Colors with Sun Study ON in Graphic Display Options. Windows remain white #FFFFFF (transparent in shaded preview). Ground base sub-element solid black #000000 with weight 5 outline. Site is white with grey-outlined entourage casting grey shadows.

stylePacks.name: Presentation — Black Night
stylePacks.description: Architecture A (Hidden Line) on a pure black background. White building silhouette with all line work in white #FFFFFF at varying weights; floors and roof fills are inverted (solid black) so they read as voids. Cut wall faces solid white. Site is white with very-light-grey #D0D0D0 herringbone (STING-Pres-Herringbone). Large trees solid white with no outline; small shrubs light-grey #C0C0C0 outline only. Set view background to Solid Black + silhouettes weight 5 white in Graphic Display Options (these settings cannot be applied via VG and must be set manually or by a Graphic Display Options step).

stylePacks.name: Presentation — Grey Shadow
stylePacks.description: Architecture C (Consistent Colors with sun study). No category overrides on the building — Revit materials provide the natural greyscale. Set visual style to Consistent Colors, enable Shadows (cast + ambient) in Graphic Display Options, and apply the STING Presentation Sun preset (azimuth 225°, altitude 35°). Background gradient grey sky — top #B0B0B0, horizon #D8D8D8 — set in Graphic Display Options. Ground base sub-element solid mid-grey #A8A8A8 with grey weight 3 outline. Topography near-white #F5F5F5 with #E0E0E0 herringbone (STING-Pres-Herringbone). Large trees solid white with grey outline; small shrubs grey outline only.

stylePacks.name: Presentation — Interior Terracotta
stylePacks.description: Architecture C (Realistic). Interior commercial spaces, semantic rule: architecture = terracotta, furniture = white. Set visual style to Realistic. Walls render in terracotta #C47060; columns in dark terracotta #7A3018; floors use STING-Pres-Herringbone @ #D48060 over a #E8C0B0 background. Furniture/casework/specialty equipment all overridden to white #FFFFFF to contrast with the architecture. Interior planting in orange-terracotta #C86030; exterior trees seen through glazing render solid white with light-grey outline.

stylePacks.name: Presentation — Interior Sage
stylePacks.description: Architecture C (Realistic). Interior commercial spaces, semantic rule: architecture = grey, furniture = sage green. Set visual style to Realistic. Walls render mid-grey #A0A8A4; ceilings slightly lighter #B8BEB8; columns dark grey #505050; floors use STING-Pres-Herringbone @ #B8BEB8 over a #D0D4D0 background. All furniture, casework, specialty equipment, and interior plants overridden to sage green #8BAF85; large interior plants forest green #4A7A4A. Glazing transparent with dark grey #505050 frame. Exterior trees seen through glazing render solid white with light-grey outline.
